stat: UK government direct AI funding announced or detailed across the twelve months covered by the AI Opportunities Action Plan: One Year On
applies_to: clusters: Strategy & ROI; Risk, Governance & Legal
method: Recipe E (funding maths) — aggregation of named funding lines from a single primary government document

sources_used.title: AI Opportunities Action Plan: One Year On
sources_used.publisher: Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT)

workings: AISI 240 + AIRR 250 + Edinburgh supercomputer 750 + Sovereign AI Unit 500 + TechFirst 187 + Modern Industrial Strategy AI 150 + HDRS gov contribution 400 (of 600 total) + NDL 100 + Robotics/Made Smarter 40 + Smart Data 36 + AI Growth Zones direct 25 + AI Assurance Innovation Fund 11 + Regulators' Pioneer Fund 8.9 + TechLocal AI Accelerator 7.8 + AI Capability Fund 3.6 = 2,709.3 GBP million ≈ 2.6 GBP billion (rounded down conservatively). Excludes the £28.2bn private investment the AI Growth Zones programme is reported to have generated.
